description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa with a boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a dark blue or charcoal fabric. The sofa features a single, continuous seat cushion and a matching back cushion, both of which appear to be firmly attached and uniformly padded. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a robust and structured appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The base of the sofa is fully enclosed, with no visible legs, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with straight armrests and smooth, dark upholstery, featuring a single seat and back cushion. The design is minimalist with no visible legs or decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, straight armrests, and the single seat and back cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, straight armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned back panel and the sofa's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One continuous seat cushion and one continuous back cushion, both attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick armrests at the same height as the backrest, boxy profile, fully padded, no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base is fully enclosed, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with an attached cushion, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
